title: Speaker Attribution
description: Separate system audio and mic transcription streams. Label 'them' vs 'me' in transcript. Feed labeled transcript to LLM for better summaries.

title: Template Engine & Markdown Output
description: Markdown template engine with %%placeholders%%, file output to configurable folder, clipboard support, filename patterns.

title: Implement %%placeholder%% template parser
description: Parse Markdown templates, extract %%placeholders%%, validate against known placeholder set. Support default template bundled with app.

title: Meeting output writer
description: Fill template with meeting metadata + LLM output. Write .md file to configured folder with configurable filename pattern. Optionally copy to clipboard.

title: Template management settings
description: UI for creating/editing/deleting templates. Default template ships with app. Template picker in title prompt dialog.

title: Meeting Lifecycle Manager
description: MeetingManager component: start/pause/resume/stop/title/process lifecycle. Replaces Handy's TranscriptionCoordinator for long-running sessions.

title: Implement MeetingManager state machine
description: State machine: Idle → Recording → Paused → Stopped → TitlePrompt → Processing → Done. Thread-safe with Arc<Mutex>. Emit Tauri events on state transitions.

title: Wire global hotkeys to MeetingManager
description: Map global hotkeys (configurable) to start/pause/stop/cancel. Reuse Handy's shortcut infrastructure with new bindings.

title: Audio-to-disk streaming for long meetings
description: Stream mixed audio to temp WAV segments on disk during recording. Concatenate on stop. Clean up temp files after transcription.

title: Full-audio transcription pass
description: After stop: concatenate audio segments, feed full audio to Whisper for single-pass transcription. Emit progress events.

title: LLM summarization with template
description: After transcription: compose LLM prompt from template, send transcript to configured provider, parse response into template placeholders.

title: Obsidian Integration
description: Obsidian plugin or URI scheme for linking meetings to notes, tagging, backlinks.

title: Calendar Integration
description: macOS Calendar / Google Calendar integration. Auto-detect meetings, pre-fill title/participants/duration from calendar event.

title: Add screencapturekit crate dependency
description: Add screencapturekit to Cargo.toml with audio capture features (macos_13_0). Gate behind #[cfg(target_os = "macos")].

title: Implement SystemAudioCapture module
description: New module in audio_toolkit: initialize SCStream with audio-only config, capture system audio PCM samples, resample to 16kHz mono via rubato.

title: Dual-stream audio mixer
description: Mix system audio (ScreenCaptureKit) and mic audio (CPAL) into a single f32 buffer. Stream chunks to temp WAV files on disk for long meetings.

title: Screen Recording permission handling
description: Add NSScreenCaptureUsageDescription to Info.plist. Detect permission state, prompt user, handle denial gracefully.

title: Update GitHub repo metadata (description, URL, topics)
description:
Update github.com/assaflavi/Yad repo properties:

- Description: Yad (יד) — local macOS meeting transcription and summarization, powered by Whisper
- Website URL: remove or update (no Yad site yet)
- Topics: update from Handy's tags to relevant ones (e.g. macos, whisper, meeting-transcription, speech-to-text, tauri, rust)
- Remove any inherited Handy-specific metadata that doesn't apply

title: Cross-platform Support
description: Windows (WASAPI loopback), Linux (PipeWire monitor sources). Platform-specific audio capture implementations.

title: Frontend UX (Tray + Settings + Title Prompt)
description: Tray menu with recording controls, title prompt dialog after stop, settings window (General/Audio/Models/Summarization/History/Shortcuts), processing indicator.

title: Reshape tray menu for meeting controls
description: Tray menu shows recording status/duration during session. Items: Start, Pause/Resume, Stop & Summarize, Cancel. Settings and Quit always present.

title: Title prompt dialog
description: Small Tauri window after stop: text input pre-filled with timestamp, template picker dropdown, Summarize button, Save Transcript Only option.

title: Settings window — meeting-oriented
description: Tabs: General (doc language, output folder, filename pattern, clipboard toggle), Audio (mic selection), Models (reuse Handy), Summarization (provider/key/model/templates), History, Shortcuts.

title: Processing indicator
description: Small floating window or notification: Transcribing → Summarizing → Done with Open action. Tray icon state changes.

title: Meeting history view
description: List past meetings (title, date, duration) in settings. Open .md file, delete entries.

title: Notepad Mode
description: Granola-style scratchpad during meetings. User notes merged with transcript by LLM for richer summaries.

title: In-room Capture
description: Physical meeting mode with single mic capturing all participants. Possibly multi-speaker diarization.

title: Real-time Transcript Feedback
description: Incremental transcription on silence/pause detection during recording. Live transcript in expandable view. Final output still from full concatenated audio.

title: Update README with Yad's purpose and current status
description:
Replace the current Handy README with content reflecting Yad's identity and status:

- Rename/rebrand: Yad (יד — Hebrew for 'hand'), a macOS meeting transcription and summarization app
- Explain the relationship to upstream Handy (fork acknowledgment)
- Describe Yad's purpose: local meeting recording, transcription, and LLM-powered summarization
- Current status: early development / MVP in progress
- Reference docs/DESIGN.md for architecture details
- Update badges, links, and installation instructions for Yad
- Remove Handy-specific sections (sponsors, Windows/Linux platform notes, etc.) that don't apply

title: Onboarding Flow
description: First-launch flow: Screen Recording permission, Microphone permission, model download, LLM provider setup, output folder configuration.

title: Screen Recording permission onboarding step
description: Guide user to grant Screen Recording permission. Detect current state, show instructions, verify after grant.

title: LLM provider setup onboarding step
description: Configure summarization provider (OpenAI/Anthropic/custom), API key or OAuth, model selection. Test connection.

title: Output folder configuration step
description: Let user pick output folder for .md files. Default to ~/Meeting Notes/. Show Obsidian vault hint.
